scripts.cap:sync: node scripts/assert-node-minimum.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/run-cap.mjs sync
scripts.cap:sync:android: node scripts/assert-node-minimum.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/run-cap.mjs sync android
scripts.cap:sync:android:only: node scripts/assert-node-minimum.mjs && node scripts/run-cap.mjs sync android
scripts.cap:open:android: node scripts/assert-node-minimum.mjs && node scripts/run-cap.mjs open android
scripts.cap:android: node scripts/assert-node-minimum.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/run-cap.mjs sync android && node scripts/run-cap.mjs open android
scripts.apk: node scripts/ensure-public-img.mjs && node scripts/assert-android-build-env.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/run-cap.mjs sync android
scripts.apk:build: node scripts/ensure-public-img.mjs && node scripts/assert-android-build-env.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/run-cap.mjs sync android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: node scripts/ensure-public-img.mjs && node scripts/assert-android-build-env.mjs && npm run build && node scripts/run-cap.mjs sync android && node scripts/run-gradle.mjs assembleRelease
